sections.title: Personal
sections.body: Tutor Victory is committed to protecting the privacy of our students and parents. This privacy policy outlines our practices regarding the collection, use and disclosure of personal information in connection with out tutoring service.

sections.title: Personal information
sections.body: We collect personal information from users who register for our tutoring services. This information may include: Name, Email address, Phone number, Billing information, Academic information, Feedback and reviews. Tutor Victory collects personal identification information from Students in ways including but not limited to the information they provide when submitting the “Book FREE Consultation” form on the site and providing us with their details on external tutoring sites (through which they consent to providing Tutor Victory with their details). We may use this information to optimise the Student’s tutoring experience as well as using it to improve how other prospective Students engage with Tutor Victory’s services.

sections.title: Personal information of minors
sections.body: Tutor Victory does not knowingly collect the personal information of individuals under the age of 15. If the individual is under the age of 15, Tutor Victory advises that they contact us through a parent or legal guardian. All contact between a Tutor and a Student if the latter is under the age of 15 requires the a parent/responsible adult to be present or within hearing range during the tutoring and being free to observe, and be present for, each session.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.body: We take reasonable measures to protect personal information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. We use industry-standard encryption to protect sensitive information during transmission and storage.

sections.title: Acceptance of Privacy Policy and Any Updates
sections.body: Tutor Victory may update this Privacy Policy at any time, and it is the Student’s responsibility to frequently check whether any updates have been made. Thus, by engaging in Tutor Victory’s services, the Student is agreeing to be bound to the current version of the Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Contact Us
sections.body: If you have any questions or concerns about our Privacy Policy, please contact us at contact@tutorvictory.com.au.
